reference: Please avoid high-intensity exercise for now. You should get your blood pressure measured and have some investigations done: lipid profile, electrocardiography, and echocardiography. Please get back to me with the reports.
text: Please avoid high-intensity exercise for now. You should get your blood pressure measured and have some investigations done: lipid profile, electrocardiography, and echocardiography. Please get back to me with the reports.
